name: KELLY SERVICES INC
business: Kelly is a global specialty talent solutions company providing temporary and permanent staffing services, outcome-based solutions, recruitment process outsourcing (RPO), managed service provider (MSP) services, and payroll process outsourcing (PPO) to a diverse group of clients across various industries.
sellsTo: international clients in the Americas, Europe, and Asia-Pacific

exposures.sentence: We are one of the largest providers of temporary and permanent staffing services, outcome-based solutions, RPO, MSP and payroll process outsourcing (PPO).
The Company employs a range of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to support its talent related solutions.
Technological advances, including advances in automation and artificial intelligence, may significantly disrupt the labor market and weaken demand for human capital.

We routinely experience cyberattacks, which may include the use or attempted use of malware, ransomware, computer viruses, phishing, social engineering schemes and other means of attempted disruption or unauthorized access.

catalysts.event: First phase of SET business integration completed and went live
catalysts.sentence: The first phase of integrating the SET business was completed and went live in early 2026.
